# Python dependencies for the paulasilva-ms derivative scripts.
#
# Install:
#   pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
#   python -m playwright install chromium   # only needed for deck_to_pdf.py
#
# Per script:
#   deck_to_pdf.py          playwright, pypdf
#   build_pptx.py           python-pptx, lxml
#   build_excel_dashboard.py  openpyxl
#   export_notes.py         standard library only
#   validate_html.py        standard library only

playwright>=1.40,<2.0
pypdf>=4.0,<6.0
python-pptx>=0.6.21,<1.1
lxml>=4.9,<6.0
openpyxl>=3.1,<4.0
